author: suctl
description: Manages systemd services on the host for the service surface.

capabilities.name: os.service.register
capabilities.description: Register a systemd service for suctl management.

capabilities.name: os.service.unregister
capabilities.description: Remove a service from suctl management.

capabilities.name: os.service.start
capabilities.description: Start a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.stop
capabilities.description: Stop a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.restart
capabilities.description: Restart a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.survey
capabilities.description: Survey suctl-registered services with live systemd active/sub state for the service surface.

capabilities.name: os.service.focus
capabilities.description: Focus view for one registered service: full systemd state plus state-valid actions.
